Typhoon Matmo (2025): Rapid Report

Lincole Jiang, Majd Abid, Lawrence Chillrud, G. Brooke Anderson, Robbie M. Parks

2026-04-16

Summary

Data status: Provisional — not yet reanalyzed (PROVISIONAL)

Typhoon Matmo (2025) was active from 2025-10-01 06:00:00 to 2025-10-05 18:00:00 UTC. Based on IBTrACS data obtained 04/16/2026, 43,391,294 people experienced tropical cyclone-force (>= 17.49 m/s) winds and 7,515,689 people experienced hurricane-force (>= 32.90 m/s) winds across China, Philippines, Viet Nam. No areas experienced Category 5 winds.

Table 1: Population exposed by country and storm intensity
Country Population exposed (tropical cyclone-force) Population exposed (hurricane-force)
China 34,489,391 7,515,689
Philippines 8,666,748 0
Viet Nam 235,155 0

When accounting for total population, the table below shows the percentage of each country’s population exposed.

Table 2: Percentage of total population exposed by country and storm intensity
Country % Population exposed (tropical cyclone-force) % Population exposed (hurricane-force)
China 2.4 0.5
Philippines 7.8 0.0
Viet Nam 0.2 0.0

The spatial extent of the impacts is illustrated in Figure 1, which maps exposure by wind intensity threshold at the second administrative unit (ADM2) level along with the storm track of Matmo.

Figure 1: Spatial distribution of exposure

Characterizing exposed areas

Figure 2 shows the distribution of relative deprivation (measured by population-weighted GRDI, aggregated to ADM2 level) and population for each exposed area, categorized by exposure status.

Figure 2: Socioeconomic and population distribution of exposed areas
